data.title: Charles & Colvard receives non-compliance letter from Nasdaq
data.description:
• Charles & Colvard (NASDAQ:CTHR) on Thursday said it has received a deficiency notification letter from Nasdaq, indicating that the company was not in compliance with listing rules, as a result of its failure to timely file annual report on Form 10-K for the year ended June 30, 2024.
  • The company filed a notification of late filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission on October 1, 2024.
  • The notice has no immediate effect on the listing or trading of the company's common stock on Nasdaq. 
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Seacoast Banking GAAP EPS of $0.36 in-line, revenue of $130.3M beats by $1.1M
data.description:
• Seacoast Banking press release (NASDAQ:SBCF): Q3 GAAP EPS of $0.36 in-line.
  • Revenue of $130.3M (-5.0% Y/Y) beats by $1.1M.
  • Net interest income totaled $106.7 million in the third quarter of 2024, an increase of $2.2 million, or 2%, compared to the prior quarter.
  • Net interest margin decreased one basis point to 3.17% in the third quarter of 2024 compared to 3.18% in the second quarter of 2024.
  • Noninterest income totaled $23.7 million in the third quarter of 2024, an increase of $1.5 million, or 7%, compared to the prior quarter
  • "We do not expect a significant impact from Hurricane Helene, but an additional provision for credit losses may be warranted in the fourth quarter of 2024 for Hurricane Milton, in a range between approximately $5 million and $10 million," the company said.

data.title: Community West Bancshares GAAP EPS of $0.18
data.description: • Community West Bancshares press release (NASDAQ:CWBC): Q3 GAAP EPS of $0.18.

data.title: Glacier Bancorp GAAP EPS of $0.45 beats by $0.04
data.description:
• Glacier Bancorp press release (NYSE:GBCI): Q3 GAAP EPS of $0.45 beats by $0.04.
  • Net income was $51.1 million for the current quarter, an increase of $6.3 million, or 14 percent, from the prior quarter.
  • The net interest margin as a percentage of earning assets, on a tax-equivalent basis, for the current quarter was 2.83 percent.
  • Net interest income was $180 million for the current quarter, an increase of $13.8 million, or 8 percent, from the prior quarter.

• Comstock (NYSE:LODE) prospectus related to the offer and resale by selling stockholders of up to 6.9M shares of common stock.

data.title: Hilltop GAAP EPS of $0.46 beats by $0.09, revenue of $305.49M beats by $4.34M

data.title: Aeries Technology regains compliance with Nasdaq listing rules
data.description:
• Aeries Technology (NASDAQ:AERT) on Thursday said it has received a notice from Nasdaq, stating that the company has regained compliance with Nasdaq listing rule of periodic reporting.
  • The company filed Form 10-Q for the fiscal quarter ended June 30, 2024, and Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2024 to regain the compliance.
  • AERT +3.29% after hours to $1.88.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: PCB Bancorp GAAP EPS of $0.52 beats by $0.07, revenue of $25.34M misses by $0.19M
data.description:
• PCB Bancorp press release (NASDAQ:PCB): Q3 GAAP EPS of $0.52 beats by $0.07.
  • Revenue of $25.34M (+1.6% Y/Y) misses by $0.19M.
  • Shares +1.94%.

data.title: Business First Bancshares Non-GAAP EPS of $0.68 beats by $0.11
data.description:
• Business First Bancshares press release (NASDAQ:BFST): Q3 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.68 beats by $0.11.
  • Business First’s board of directors declared a quarterly preferred dividend in the amount of $18.75 per share.
  • For the quarter ended September 30, 2024, net interest income totaled $56.1 million, compared to $54.0 million from the linked quarter.
  • Net interest margin and net interest spread were 3.51% and 2.54% compared to 3.45% and 2.47% for the linked quarter.
  • During the quarter ended September 30, 2024, Business First recorded a provision for credit losses of $1.7 million, compared to $1.3 million from the linked quarter.

data.title: Earnings Snapshot: DexCom tops Q3 consensus, reiterates expectations for FY24
